title: Netherite Revamped
description: This resourcepack makes netherite a bit more brownish and changes the looks of the ancient debris ore and the netherite helmet.
body:
# Netherite Revamped
This pack will recolour all netherite items (except for the netherite block) and ancient debris. The netherite helmet and ancient debris also have a new look.
## Note!!
This pack will be "broken" or "incompatible" in any other version than 1.21.10. But you can ignore that as long as your playing on any version beteen 1.20.5-1.21.11.
